channel.title: Startup Ideas on The Multi-Agent Future
channel.description: Recent content in Startup Ideas on The Multi-Agent Future

item.title: AI Compliance Is a $23B Market — Here's How to Build In It
item.description: New AI laws in the US and EU are creating massive demand for compliance tooling. A practical breakdown of the regtech startup opportunity for 2026.

item.title: Vertical AI Agents: The Solo Founder's Best Shot at a $1M Business
item.description: Why vertical AI agents are the most asymmetric startup opportunity for solo founders in 2026, with specific niches, revenue models, and execution prompts.
